positive: Highly detailed, symmetric, full-color vector illustration of mystical forest fauna and celestial elements forming a central tessellating pattern. The main subject includes stylized glowing mushrooms, intricate swirling vines, and silhouetted forest creatures (like deer or foxes). Use a high-contrast color palette: deep midnight blue and indigo background, accented by glowing bioluminescent elements in vibrant emerald green, sapphire blue, and electric gold. The style should evoke intricate Art Nouveau meets modern zentangle, with clean, crisp lines and smooth silhouettes, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, rule of thirds balance, mystical glow lighting.
negative: blurry, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, poor details, cartoon, realistic photo
